provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Training Scheme (Trade Testing) Order and shall be read together with G.N. No. 61 of 1987.

The fees for the Trade Tests shall be as follows— Schedule Shs. Grade I 600/- Grade II 400/- Grade III 300/- History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation 29 June 1990 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
